title: My Friend Irma Goes West
writer: Cy Howard, Parke Levy, Howard Dimsdale
actors: John Lund, Marie Wilson, Diana Lynn
plot: En route to Hollywood, singer Steve, his partner Seymour and fiancée Jane, Jane's airheaded roommate Irma, and Irma's con artist fiancé Al have a series of misadventures and end up involved with a murderous gang.
